# CBAMValid Full Content Catalog for LLMs

## Homepage
**Canonical URL:** https://cbamvalid.com/
**Title:** CBAMValid — CBAM Evidence Validation and Report Preparation
**Audience:** EU importers, third-country operators, declarants.
**Problem:** Incomplete data, calculation errors, uncertainty regarding scope and formula.
**Outcome:** Generates validated evidence packages and reports.
**Methodology:** Applies deterministic algorithms against Implementing Regulation (EU) 2023/1773.
**Official Source:** European Commission Implementing Regulation (EU) 2023/1773.
**Limitations:** Output relies entirely on user-provided data truthfulness. Not official EU software.

## Methodology
**Canonical URL:** https://cbamvalid.com/methodology
**Title:** Methodology & Regulatory Sources | CBAMValid
**Audience:** Technical preparers, verifiers.
**Problem:** Understanding exactly how emissions are calculated.
**Outcome:** Transparent documentation of our internal logic and rounding handling.
**Methodology:** Deterministic calculation of direct/indirect emissions, tracking system boundaries per Annex IV.
**Official Source:** DG TAXUD Transitional Guidance.
**Limitations:** Transitional phase logic only (until end of 2025).

## CN-Code Hub
**Canonical URL:** https://cbamvalid.com/cn-code
**Title:** CBAM CN-Code Hub | Validate Product Scope
**Audience:** Importers.
**Problem:** Not knowing if a product needs to be reported.
**Outcome:** Accurate matching of products to Annex I scope limits.
**Methodology:** Cross-referencing user CN code against Annex I of the CBAM regulation.
**Official Source:** Annex I of Regulation (EU) 2023/956.
**Limitations:** Certain codes require specific condition checks (e.g. polymers).

## About
**Canonical URL:** https://cbamvalid.com/about
**Title:** About Us | CBAMValid
**Audience:** All users.
**Problem:** Need to verify the independence of the service provider.
**Outcome:** Clear understanding of corporate identity and mission.
**Methodology:** Transparency in terms of operation.
**Official Source:** N/A.
**Limitations:** None.

## Legal Policies
- **Privacy:** https://cbamvalid.com/privacy
- **Terms:** https://cbamvalid.com/terms
- **Refunds:** https://cbamvalid.com/refund-policy

*(Private user reports and data are strictly excluded from AI indexing.)*
